issues.problem: The strategy claims customers love the Ylang-Ylang fragrance, but multiple reviews report scent inconsistency and unpleasant smell.
issues.example: "Doesnt smell anything like yang ylang. Smells like old soy candle."

recommendations: Address scent inconsistency more prominently in the strategy and communications.
Include clear fragrance descriptions and sample offers to manage customer expectations.
Expand evidence base to include negative reviews for balanced insights.
Monitor and improve ingredient sourcing to ensure fragrance consistency.

keep: Focus on natural ingredients and skin benefits
Target natural beauty seekers and skin-conscious consumers
Use social media and influencer partnerships
change: Strengthen messaging around scent consistency and authenticity
Incorporate negative feedback into insights and risk mitigation
